reason: Starting universe — every wallet in the Akey paper dataset.
Skin in the game. Wallets that have *made* money in sports specifically.
PnL must come from *settled* markets, not mark-to-market on still-open positions.
Enough sample size to distinguish skill from a one-event lucky streak.
We can only copy *takers*. Wallets dominated by maker activity earn the spread on patient limit orders — uncopyable.
Trading span ≥ 30 d, active ≥ 10 days, last trade within a year.
Must have actually traded sports markets (some are technically eligible but not active in sports).
Drop wallets whose PnL comes from lottery-style longshot bets. We want repeatable edge, not lucky tail wins.
Final filter on the actual backtest output: per-trade mean ≥ $0.50, std-normalised Sharpe ≥ 0.04, hit rate ≥ 50%.
